uq_alerts_event_detection_rule.name: uq_alerts_event_detection_rule
uq_alerts_event_detection_rule.where: event_id IS NOT NULL AND detection_id IS NOT NULL

uq_alerts_event_correlation.name: uq_alerts_event_correlation
uq_alerts_event_correlation.where: trigger_type = 'correlated' AND event_id IS NOT NULL
